case_title: LARAMAR URBAN SPECIALTY PARTNERS VS. JENNIFER SHANNON et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LARAMAR URBAN SPECIALTY PARTNERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHANNON, JENNIFER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1020 POST STREET, UNIT #302, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
